remaining_params.SpellDescription: Draw a card, then discard a card. If you discarded an instant or sorcery card this way, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

params.SpellDescription: You may cast target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard this turn. If that spell would be put into your graveyard, exile it instead. Activate only as a sorcery.
params.TgtPrompt: Select target instant or sorcery card in your graveyard
